programme.title: Einstein Challenge
programme.desc: Secrets of Ancient Egypt revealed. Two Egyptologists explain hieroglyphics, how to construct pyramids, and how to make a mummy among other all-Egypt topics. Experts: Egyptologists Willa Snowbender and Dr. Kate Liszka. (New). (Reality, Drama)

programme.title: Einstein Challenge
programme.desc: Two historians explain to the panel the perils and triumphs of the Dark Ages, from the Black Death through the invention of Guttenberg's printing press. Experts: Medieval Historians Kersti Francis and Dr. Brett Whalen. (New). (Reality, Drama)

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: From the world's largest trebuchet to Nazi super cannons, these are the deadly weapons that rain destruction and spread fear on the battlefield. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: The gates are open to some of history's most sinister structures. From the terrifying Tower of London to a hotel of horrors, discover the dark secrets hidden within these foreboding fortresses. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: The dark origin stories behind some of history's most notorious methods of execution, from the guillotine to the electric chair. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: An exploration into the dark art of spy-craft, from the frankenkitty to the umbrella gun, reveals the deadliest spy weapons deployed to gather information and assassinate enemies. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: From the axe to the katana, blades wielded by fearsome warriors have forged empires. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: Booby traps are wicked devices waiting to kill, whether they're employed to repel treasure hunters, body snatchers, or wartime opponents. (Repeat). (Documentary)

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: A century ago, shipping packages was slow and shipping overnight was impossible, until two Seattle brothers risk everything to reinvent shipping packages for all; a tenacious Yale graduate creates a world-famous express delivery service. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: Founding fathers of the biggest retail stores in the world battle to be the first to innovate, build, and revolutionize the industry. And one of the top businessmen of the 20th century, Sam Walton, will construct the world's largest retail empire. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: James Gamble and Harley Procter invent a groundbreaking new soap that revolutionizes America and opens up a market to entrepreneurs, including King Gillette and Jacob Schick, whose bitter rivalry spawns a new billion-dollar industry and changes Americans' daily lives forever. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: A game designer named Steve Jobs starts a personal computer company in his parents' garage on his way to bringing computers mainstream. But when he commissions the help of a software design company run by Bill Gates, it's the beginning of one of the biggest rivalries in the history of American industry. (Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck car salesman has the visionary idea to start the first rental car company in America, and when he joins forces with cab company owner John Hertz, they spread their revolutionary business across the country. But when WWII veteran Warren Avis starts his own rental car company, fierce competition between the two gives rise to a new industry with a $100 billion annual market. (New). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: The Icons That Built America
programme.desc: In 1965, a struggling motorcycle salesman comes up with a dangerous publicity stunt that not only launches him into a new career, but changes entertainment forever. As his star rises, he'll bet it all on a stunt that could propel him to new heights or cost him his life. And a generation later, a young boy who grew up idolizing the motorcycle daredevil will take his own dangerous path to television and film success, by daring to fail. (New).

(Repeat). (Documentary, Business)

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: The offer was accepted, and now the clock is ticking as the difficulties mount. Jonathan Knight is transforming an abandoned campsite into a holiday destination, and his first project is to transform a dilapidated cabin into the ideal location for a glamping retreat. (Repeat).

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Catastrophe hits when a tree crushes a cabin, leading to pricey new problems. Also, Jon's siblings help renovate a cabin for families, but each Knight has their own opinion on creating the perfect spot for a family vacation. (New).

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A single mom looks to leave the Los Angeles grind to fully immerse herself in Cambodian culture. She plans to move to a neighborhood where her dollars will stretch further, but her tween daughter prefers the posh expat lifestyle in central Siem Reap. (New). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Following her divorce, an English mom of two looks for a new life and a new career as a private investigator on Australia's Sunshine Coast. She wants a home that's by the beach, but finding a place that meets her high standards may be a challenge. (New). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, England, an Australian family seeks an economical and attractive property. With varied preferences and the problem of locating a budget-friendly house in a highly desirable neighborhood, their search may be difficult. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters International

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Jonathan Knight picks up a 110-year-old home and moves it. (Repeat).

programme.title: Farmhouse Fixer
programme.desc: Jon and Christina renovate a farmhouse built in the late 1700s with their crew. They refitted the kitchen with centuries-old pine wood floorboards that they found in the attic of the property. (Repeat).

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A professional extreme skier and his wife ditch the ski slopes of Colorado for beachfront living in Roatan, Honduras. They hope to find a waterfront home with space for their dog so they can enjoy the island's laid-back atmosphere and abundant activities. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: An active couple is moving from Iowa to the beautiful island of St. Maarten and they're looking for a home with plenty of space for visiting family. But, he wants to be near a marina, and she's more interested in expansive ocean views. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A conservation biologist has convinced her husband to buy a home on St. Thomas. They're looking for a place that's private with ocean views but he wants to consider turnkey condos while she wants a single family home. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A southern couple is trading the country roads of West Virginia for the beaches of Vieques, Puerto Rico. She's looking for a place close to town that's turnkey while he wants a fixer-upper that's more remote and private. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A young student from California is looking to jumpstart her career in hospitality by purchasing a home in Aruba that she can also rent out. She's convinced her mom that her business plan is a good one, so Mom is helping her with the purchase. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A Wisconsin couple looks for their forever home in sunny Roatan. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A Texas couple looks for a condo in St. Croix with ocean views to be their new home. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Caribbean Life
programme.desc: A couple from Texas wants to live a stress-free life on the quiet island of St. John. He'd prefer a stand-alone home so their dog Barley has room to run around, but she loves the idea of a condo where the maintenance is taken care of. (Repeat). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach
programme.desc: The contestants face off in the main suite, competing in games for prizes to help with their improvements. Taniya, Ty, and Alison return as mentors to help their teams win the weekly $3,000 cash prize. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach
programme.desc: Participants tackle the living room. The three teams compete in an upcycling challenge to determine who can create the best light fixture from thrifted items. Bryan and Sarah Baeumler return to crown thewinners. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Battle on the Beach
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the three teams take on the Guest Suite. But as their budgets start to dwindle, contestants must make tough decisions to deliver stunning transformations. Judges Bryan and Sarah Baeumler are back to crown this week's winner. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A Laurel native, Brandon left to pursue a career as an engineer in Jackson, Mississippi. After tragedy struck his family in Laurel, Brandon reevaluated his priorities and is looking to move back to be closer to his loved ones. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Mississippi natives Rahkeam and LaDijonay are excited to embark on a new chapter together with the purchase of their first starter home in Laurel. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Brooke is looking for a traditional home with a touch of modern style. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple from Oregon are ready to move to Laurel, Mississippi with their $200,000 budget. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: An engineer and artist from Seattle is planning to move to Laurel to be closer to her dad and wants their new place to have an outdoor hot tub. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin help a couple make some upgrades in their home that used to be her grandmother's. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Embarking on a new life chapter, a woman seeks her first home with help from Ben and Erin. They create a house with a spacious front porch and a long-awaited luxury, a laundry room. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A young woman looks to buy her first home in Laurel where she and her six sisters grew up, and she wants a place where they can all gather for wine nights. Ben and Erin help her turn a bland house into a modern, moody retreat made for entertaining. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: Backed By The Bros
programme.desc: After assisting a new investor in selling her late husband's commercial space, Jonathan and Drew continue their support by reinvesting her profits into a residential property to generate much-needed income, but they only have 45 days to do so. (New).

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Cairns couple wants to be closer to nature and relocates to the developing island of Espiritu Santo, Vanuatu. He plans to use the archipelago as a backdrop for his nature videos, but the lack of western amenities has her rethinking the move entirely. (New). (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: The two best friends decide to start over in Glasgow, Scotland, after years of being separated. (Travel, Reality)

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A recent divorcee in Carlsbad, California, looks for a unique home for himself and his extensive car collection. His daughter joins the hunt to help curb his impulsiveness and offer her opinion on the homes' positive and negative energy. (Repeat). (Documentary, Reality)

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan renovate an old house into a peaceful Japanese Zen cottage with more hidden problems than expected. To help with their budget woes, they buy a decrepit duplex to renovate into a rental property, but are hit with skyrocketing costs. (Repeat). (Reality)

programme.title: After The Wildfires
programme.desc: New. A year after the tragic fire season that devastated Australia, this documentary focuses on the animals that struggled to survive, and the people who gave their all to save them.

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal..
programme.desc: S1E1 - ...Family. Biologist Patrick Aryee starts his journey in Asia as he reveals the amazing stories of how each of the world's primate species came to be. (1 of 3)

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal..
programme.desc: S1E2 - ...Family. Biologist Patrick Aryee travels to Africa to find out how primates there became bigger, stronger and smarter than anywhere else on the planet. (2 of 3)

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal..
programme.desc: S1E3 - ...Family. Patrick Aryee examines the new world monkeys from Central and South America and their evolutionary journey dating back more than 40 million years. (3 of 3)

programme.title: Surviving The Amazon
programme.desc: S1E3 - A Life Among Trees: Swing through the canopies of the Amazon's trees with a look at its 1,200 species and the creatures who call their leaves, branches and shadows home. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Surviving The Amazon
programme.desc: S1E4 - Dry Season: Faced with little water and space, animals must learn new skills to survive the dry season. If they don't, they'll quickly become the vultures' next feast. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Africa's Wild Roommates: How...
programme.desc: ...Animals Share Bed and Board. When animals create homes in the African savannah, roommates - from insects to mammals - move in, and they all contribute something to the home.

programme.title: New: Into The Big Blue Heart
programme.desc: S1E2 - The Tropics: Embark on an incredible journey into our planet's oceans, and discover how our seas sustain not only the life within them, but all life on earth. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Into The Big Blue Heart
programme.desc: S1E2 - The Subtropical Zone: Embark on an incredible journey into our planet's oceans, and discover how our seas sustain not only the life within them, but all life on earth. (S1, ep 2)

programme.title: Into The Big Blue Heart
programme.desc: S1E3 - The Temperate Zone: Embark on an incredible journey into our planet's oceans, and discover how our seas sustain not only the life within them, but all life on earth. (S1, ep 3)

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: S1E4 - The Queen is Back: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods and power outages. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Attenborough's Flying Monsters
programme.desc: David Attenborough embarks on a journey into the past to explore the ancient world of the pterosaur, a remarkable flying monster that ruled the skies 200 million years ago.

programme.title: David Attenborough's...
programme.desc: ...Natural History Museum Alive. Join Sir David Attenborough on an after-hours stroll around the British institution as he brings its collection of wonders to life - literally.

programme.title: David Attenborough: Micro Monsters
programme.desc: S1E3 - Courtship: Dating is just as tricky a business in the insect world, and Sir David Attenborough finds out how certain bugs choose and then woo their partners. (Ep 3 of 6)

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: S1E4 - The Queen is Back: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods and power outages. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: David Attenborough: Micro Monsters
programme.desc: S1E4 - Reproduction: Sir David Attenborough reveals how different bugs usher in the next generation, including the butterfly and harvestman spider. (Ep 4 of 6)

programme.title: After The Wildfires
programme.desc: New. A year after the tragic fire season that devastated Australia, this documentary focuses on the animals that struggled to survive, and the people who gave their all to save them.

programme.title: Guardians Of The Wild
programme.desc: S1E1 - Elephant Rescue: Rescuers save a trio of elephant orphans. But their lives won't be smooth sailing, as they need to learn some tough lessons before they can return to the wild. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: S14E1 - Set in Dorset's Monkey World Ape Rescue Centre, this documentary series follows the day-to-day dramas of looking after over 240 primates. (S14, ep 1)

programme.title: Supersenses
programme.desc: S1E3 - In the final episode, see the amazing world of what animals really see with their extraordinary senses, thanks to remarkable CGI and innovative film techniques. (3 of 3)

programme.desc: S1E6 - Cocos Island: Cocos Island is a gem among Costa Rica's national parks. Beyond its pristine rainforest lies a marine wilderness filled with life, from sharks to sea turtles. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing

programme.title: NASCAR Cup Series
programme.desc: NASCAR Cup Series drivers make a stop in the Granite State for the USA Today 301. Ryan Blaney took his first checkered flag of the season in the Cup Series' first stop in Iowa on June 16. Martin Truex Jr. won last year's event in New Hampshire. (Auto racing)

programme.title: 2024 Copa America
programme.desc: The U.S. begins Copa America play against Bolivia as the pre-tournament co-favorites in Group C. Coach Greg Berhalter's squad looks for a good showing against a Bolivian side which has lost 11 of it's last 14 matches. (Soccer)

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL. (Football)

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Hosted by Tony Reali in the ESPN studio and joined via satellite by four panelists from across the country, the team debates popular sports stories. Reali acts as moderator, giving points for well-made arguments and deducting points for those who inspire him to hit the "mute" button. At the end of the show, whomever Reali deems the winner has 30 seconds without interruption to voice their final opinions on any topic they want. (Sports talk)

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day. (Sports talk)

programme.title: The Key of David
programme.desc: Vision Television host Gerald Flurry presents a weekly analysis of world events. Through the perspective of biblical prophecy, Flurry delivers messages of warning, often about issues concerning the growing power and influence of the European Union. From the studios of the Philadelphia Church of God, "The Key of David" attempts to stand out among today's modern devotional programming. Its viewers have referred to the program as frank, bold and rational without an overt emotional sentimentality. (Religious)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Netherlands is up against Austria in Berlin in Group D of the 2024 European Championships. Netherlands has won seven consecutive games versus Austria. The most recent of those matches was a 2-0 victory in Amsterdam in the EURO 2020 group stage. (Soccer)

programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Denmark takes on Serbia in Munich in Group C of EURO 2024. The only EUROs meeting was a 5-0 win for the Danes versus Yugoslavia in the group stage of EURO 1984. Frank Arnesen (2), Klaus Berggreen, Preben Elkjær and John Lauridsen scored the goals. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Slovakia plays Romania in Frankfurt am Main in Group E of EURO 2024. Slovakia won one of its 11 matches against Romania, a 1-0 friendly win in Bratislava on Aug. 23, 1942. The most recent meeting was a 1-1 friendly draw in Bucharest on Aug. 14, 2013. (Soccer)

programme.title: Euro Today
programme.desc: The latest news and analyses from the UEFA European Championship. (Soccer)

programme.title: 2024 UEFA European Championship
programme.desc: Czechia contests Türkiye in Hamburg in Group F of the 2024 European Championships. Türkiye won both of its two EUROs matches against Czechia: 3-2 in the EURO 2008 group stage (from 2-0 down with 15 minutes left) and 2-0 in the EURO 2016 group stage. (Soccer)

programme.desc: "NBA Countdown" serves as the primer for game telecasts on the ESPN family of networks. It's highlighted by a lively roundtable discussion and debate of the top storylines around the league. programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: S7E1 - The Game Wardens patrol the beach, lake, and land, as summer is in full swing; Wardens educate a dog owner about leaving pets in the sun; an under-age drinker tells too many lies; Wardens inspect novice jet skiers on a busy recreational lake. (Reality, Law, Animals)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S9E8 - When a dog that was adopted out mysteriously appears in a shelter in Mississippi, Tania and Earl head to the rescue; parolee Joe must separate two stray dogs fighting outside the shelter, leaving him shaken; hound dog adoption doesn't go as planned. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S9E9 - After his adopter passes away, Tania heads to California to pick up a former VRC dog; a couple from Arkansas struggle to make a decision about which dog to adopt; after being rescued, a badly injured puppy turns out to be a missing pet. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
programme.desc: S1E3 - Jeremy heads to Australia to investigate a terrifying underwater attack by a six-foot beast in a remote Outback river. (Animals, Outdoors, Nature)

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
programme.desc: S1E8 - A recent sighting in South Africa of a half-human, half-fish beast draws Jeremy Wade into the story of a creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation. (Animals, Outdoors, Nature)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S6E3 - Wade comes face-to-face with one of South America's greatest freshwater fighting fish. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Wade is on the hunt to find out what was behind the Sobral Santos attack on the Amazon River, where more than 200 passengers were killed on a pitch-black night. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S6E6 - The rivers of Guyana may host a real freshwater mermaid that the locals call the Water Mama. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S6E2 - Wade teams up with a local tribe to solve three mysterious deaths in three different South American countries. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S6E5 - Wade faces one of his greatest fears to uncover increasing missing persons cases. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S6E4 - Wade hunts for the Lau-lau, a creature said to swallow men whole. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S5E1 - Jeremy investigates the case of a Bolivian man who had his face ripped off by a ferocious river predator, leading to a showdown with an old adversary. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S5E4 - Angler Jeremy Wade pushes himself and his gear past breaking point to discover what killed a bride in the Colombian Amazon; amidst dense jungle and hostage-taking rebels, Jeremy discovers evidence that turns the investigation on its head. programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S5E3 - Jeremy travels to Central America to locate a man-sized beast that reportedly leaps into boats and inflicts devastating injuries upon fishermen. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy's quest to locate the legendary Loch Ness Monster takes him from the depths of the Scottish lake to the volcanoes of Iceland. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wildside
programme.desc: S1E22 - In Maine, game wardens patrol the rugged terrain, catch poachers, track dangerous wildlife and perform intense search-and-rescue missions. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Amanda to the Rescue
programme.desc: S2E10 - Amanda teams up again with Tia of "Pit Bulls and Parolees" to help Aiden, a Great Dane mix with a brain issue; she meets Chickpea, a French bulldog with a medical condition that quickly turns into a life or death situation. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens

programme.desc: S3E8 - Wardens patrol the crowded rivers, only to find a sunken jet boat and its unhappy driver; a warden stops out-of-state campers when he smells something out of the ordinary. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: S2E2 - The day takes a grim turn when wardens step into the world of "CSI" to determine where a deer was killed; a poaching-loving family is finally going to trial after discovering their responsibility behind multiple animal deaths. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens
programme.desc: S1E7 - It's all hands-on-deck for the wardens when they handle decapitated deer and a poached trophy bull elk. Meanwhile, as a winter storm brews, wardens join forces in hot pursuit to catch a decoy shooter and a hunter caught in a web of lies. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Yellowstone Wardens

programme.desc: S2E12 - In Region 7, wardens are on a mission to catch illegal road hunters. Meanwhile, wardens celebrate a veteran warden by reminiscing on his career. (Reality, Crime, Outdoors, Animals)

programme.title: Homestead Rescue

programme.desc: S1E1 - Dexter the dog has serious breathing problems; the team of pickers counting on abandoned storage locker goods gets an unfortunate surprise; Halo the chihuahua discovers more than exercise in the local dog park. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized
programme.desc: S1E6 - The survival of species is an essential part of the Bronx Zoo's mission; for some animals, the process of breeding can be tricky, especially when it involves a few hundred pounds of muscle, sharp teeth, and bad tempers. (Animals, Reality)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S12E5 - Former adopters return with their hearts set on Caleb, but Tia Torres isn't sure he's the best fit; when a local man is arrested, Villalobos is asked to help with the dog he left behind; the loss of another employee leaves the center shorthanded. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S11E3 - Remembering the first pit bull that Tia rescued, and the dog that walked Tania down the aisle; the family looks back at the most memorable dogs. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S3E2 - The doctors are honored for their contributions to the community; a goat with a twisted leg; a Great Dane with a life-threatening condition; a bulldog is rescued from a puppy mill. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S2E8 - The doctors visit their alma mater for a class reunion and become professors for a day; a shih tzu is rushed to the clinic after swallowing a large piece of rawhide, while the owner of a pit bull with a deformed leg must consider drastic surgery. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S2E6 - Dr. Blue discovers a huge problem for a paralyzed Yorkie; Dr. Ross takes care of a pair of post-scuffle roosters, before joining Dr. Lavigne on a hyena consultation; the Lavigne family hosts a dinner party showcasing Anne's cooking skills. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: Life at Vet U
programme.desc: S1E1 - Students anxiously await their match results for next year's internship program; however, they must still pass their final rotations. (Reality, Medical, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Life at Vet U
programme.desc: S1E2 - Tension in the air is thick throughout the hospital as match day has arrived; fourth-year students discover their fate and if they will be interning. (Reality, Medical, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E10 - An adventurous pup falls from a trampoline and it's up to Dr. Jeff and Petra to mend its broken leg; a dog called Pebbles must undergo emergency surgery for bladder stones; Dr. Jeff also helps a young alligator with an injured tail. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E5 - Dr. Jeff and his team give some aid at Lakota Reservation in South Dakota; Amy debates about emergency surgery for a French bulldog that ate its favorite toy; Susan finds a forever home for Koda the lovable canine. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E3 - Dr. Jeff performs surgeries with the help of two vet students; a tribe of fainting goats is seen by Dr. Jeff and Hector; Dr. Amy discovers why a cute and cuddly kitten is teary-eyed. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E1 - Dr. Jeff performs a surgery he's never done before on a dog experiencing labored breathing; a senior canine is abandoned by its owner, and the staff must find it a new forever home; neglected ornate box turtles are saved by Dr. Baier. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E10 - An adventurous pup falls from a trampoline and it's up to Dr. Jeff and Petra to mend its broken leg; a dog called Pebbles must undergo emergency surgery for bladder stones; Dr. Jeff also helps a young alligator with an injured tail. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E5 - Dr. Jeff and his team give some aid at Lakota Reservation in South Dakota; Amy debates about emergency surgery for a French bulldog that ate its favorite toy; Susan finds a forever home for Koda the lovable canine. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E3 - Dr. Jeff performs surgeries with the help of two vet students; a tribe of fainting goats is seen by Dr. Jeff and Hector; Dr. Amy discovers why a cute and cuddly kitten is teary-eyed. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: S7E1 - Dr. Jeff performs a surgery he's never done before on a dog experiencing labored breathing; a senior canine is abandoned by its owner, and the staff must find it a new forever home; neglected ornate box turtles are saved by Dr. Baier. (Reality, Animals, Medical)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S2E8 - The doctors visit their alma mater for a class reunion and become professors for a day; a shih tzu is rushed to the clinic after swallowing a large piece of rawhide, while the owner of a pit bull with a deformed leg must consider drastic surgery. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: S2E6 - Dr. Blue discovers a huge problem for a paralyzed Yorkie; Dr. Ross takes care of a pair of post-scuffle roosters, before joining Dr. Lavigne on a hyena consultation; the Lavigne family hosts a dinner party showcasing Anne's cooking skills. (Reality, Animals, Pets, Medical)

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: S5E5 - Einstein the cat ferociously attacks whenever he sees the other house cat, Izzy; a couple expecting their first baby must make a decision about their indoor cat, Ben who was diagnosed with Toxoplasmosis which could threaten the newborn's life. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: S9E10 - Jackson works on the behavior of a hyperactive Persian cat named Mr. Weasley; Jackson finds a way to move an exiled cat indoors. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Bee Czar
programme.desc: S1E10 - Before Walter can celebrate his birthday, he and Will must extract a hive from a firehouse; Walter's sons Bodhi and Odin pitch in to handle underground bees; Meredith tackles her first hive on the roof of a church; Walter's mom comes to town. (Documentary)

programme.title: Animal Cribs
programme.desc: S2E6 - Ricky adopted a 20-foot Burmese python he rescued from a burning building, and now needs Antonio's help to transform his basement into an epic habitat with heated rock facades, a waterfall and a pond. (Reality, Animals, Home improvement)

programme.title: Pets & Pickers
programme.desc: S1E8 - Treating their dog's allergy plunges a young couple deep into debt; a hognose snake is reluctant to eat; early plans for a dog sanctuary are riding on a successful, well attended auction. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized
programme.desc: S1E5 - The Bronx Zoo is equipped to help a variety of members from the animal kingdom; a silverback gorilla with a toothache; a tiny toad being brought back from near extinction. (Animals, Reality)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S12E6 - Villalobos is stretched thin when rescue calls come in one after another; a couple from rural Idaho visits the shelter; Mariah Torres and parolee Leigh help a neighbor whose dog has become too much to handle. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: S11E6 - Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps; Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house; a couple from New York look for a companion to share their active lives. (Reality, Animals, Pets)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S5E5 - Jeremy visits a waterfall in the Pacific Northwest where an ancient creature allegedly attacks swimmers. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S5E2 - Jeremy looks into a series of grisly attacks at the site of the world's worst nuclear power plant accident. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S3E5 - Jeremy Wade is in Brazil, searching for a river monster that has killed three cowboys. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S3E4 - Angler Jeremy Wade heads to the Australian outback to try and catch the rare and fearsome freshwater sawfish, a shadowy predator said to be 18 feet long and known to attack boats. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: S3E7 - Jeremy Wade sets out for South America to find a monster. (Reality, Documentary, Nature, Animals)

programme.desc: Mum and Dad need to finish their housework; Dad, Bluey and Bingo play Sheepdog; Jack pretends to be a sailor on his way home. (Animated, Children, Entertainment)

programme.title: Wreck-It Ralph
programme.desc: Arcade-game character Wreck-It Ralph (John C. Reilly) is tired of always being the "bad guy" and losing to his "good guy" opponent, Fix-It Felix (Jack McBrayer). Finally, after decades of seeing all the glory go to Felix, Ralph decides to take matters into his own hands. He sets off on a game-hopping trip to prove that he has what it takes to be a hero. However, while on his quest, Ralph accidentally unleashes a deadly enemy that threatens the entire arcade. (Animated, Children, Comedy, Adventure)

programme.title: The Jungle Book
programme.desc: Raised by a family of wolves since birth, Mowgli (Neel Sethi) must leave the only home he's ever known when the fearsome tiger Shere Khan (Idris Elba) unleashes his mighty roar. Guided by a no-nonsense panther (Ben Kingsley) and a free-spirited bear (Bill Murray), the young boy meets an array of jungle animals, including a slithery python and a smooth-talking ape. Along the way, Mowgli learns valuable life lessons as his epic journey of self-discovery leads to fun and adventure. (Children, Adventure, Action, Fantasy)

Now, with the help of Helga and the hotel manager, Mr. Stringer (Rowan Atkinson), Luke the mouse must fight back against the witches. (Children, Fantasy, Adventure)

programme.desc: After Barbara (Geena Davis) and Adam Maitland (Alec Baldwin) die in a car accident, they find themselves stuck haunting their country residence, unable to leave the house. When the unbearable Deetzes (Catherine O'Hara, Jeffrey Jones) and teen daughter Lydia (Winona Ryder) buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. Their efforts attract Beetlejuice (Michael Keaton), a rambunctious spirit whose "help" quickly becomes dangerous for the Maitlands and innocent Lydia. (Comedy, Fantasy)

programme.desc: Sad little rich girl Alyssa (Ashley Olsen) and orphaned tomboy Amanda (Mary-Kate Olsen) meet at summer camp and discover that they are each other's exact double. And each girl is worried about her caregiver. Alyssa's father, Roger (Steve Guttenberg), is about to marry a gold digger, and Amanda's kind social worker, Diane (Kirstie Alley), will be pushed aside if a cruel family adopts Amanda. The girls decide to switch identities to make their loved ones fall in love with each other. (Comedy)

programme.desc: Mark Levin hosts FOX News Channel's "Life, Liberty and Levin." The program aims to explore the fundamental values and principles of American society, politics, culture, and current events and the impact that these things have on the nation's future and the everyday lives of the citizens. Levin also hosts "The Mark Levin Show," and prior to joining FOX, he served as an adviser to some of President Ronald Reagan's cabinet members. (News)

programme.desc: This early morning show is for people who enjoy the information they get from "FOX and Friends" but want it earlier. Todd Piro and Carley Shimkus host the show that requires them to get up at the crack of dawn. They report on the day's headlines while offering viewers the latest information regarding health, legal, political and lifestyle topics. Consider this the pregame show for the main "FOX and Friends" show that follows it. (Newsmagazine)

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Approximately 51 percent of the U.S. population is made up of women, but on "Outnumbered" the female advantage jumps to a 4-1 ratio. The hourlong show features a rotating panel of four women and one man discussing the day's headlines from various perspectives. In addition to the top news of the hour, the panelists discuss leading pop culture and relationship issues making headlines that day. Regular FNC and FBN contributors appearing on the show on a rotational basis include Harris Faulkner, Meghan McCain and Pete Hegseth. (News)

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts. (News)

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum has been part of the Fox News family for a number of years but made the jump to prime time while chronicling the first 100 days of President Trump's administration. Now she's branching out to cover all of the happenings in the nation's capital on "The Story." She keeps viewers up-to-date on the critical decisions, political maneuvers and key developments coming out of D.C. Through interviews with guests and reports from the network's roster of correspondents, MacCallum goes in-depth on the stories that matter to viewers. (News)

programme.title: Your World With Neil Cavuto
programme.desc: Hosted by Neil Cavuto, FNC's business news senior vice president, this program covers the latest business news stories, in addition to giving analysis on how the stock market moved through the day. It also covers political stories and how they may affect the markets. (Bus./financial, News)

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: The weekday opinion show is a roundtable ensemble of five rotating Fox News personalities who discuss and debate the top news stories, controversies and issues of the day, from politics to pop culture. Some of the network's featured people who appear include Greg Gutfeld, Dana Perino and Jesse Watters. The hosts conclude each show by selecting a topic of their choice for the "One More Thing" segment. (Talk, Interview, Politics)

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier hosts this live weeknight newscast that places an emphasis on political stories from Washington, D.C. (Talk, News)

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham is one of the most listened to women on political talk radio in the country. Ingraham earned a B.A. degree at Dartmouth college and a Juris Doctor degree at the University of Virginia School of Law. She took the knowledge from her J.D. degree and applied it to serve as a litigator and Supreme Court law clerk. She is also the best-selling author of five books. Tune in to watch"The Ingraham Angle," as the program serves to discuss the issues that are being overlooked and other issues that are causing turmoil in the United States. (News)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites some friends over for a classic Southern oyster roast with a light and hearty makeover; she prepares roasted oysters with Thai chili mignonette, crab rangoon wonton cups, easy Brunswick stew and slow cooker black cherry cobbler. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown
programme.desc: S8E3 - Kardea Brown is firing up the grill for everything from dinner to dessert; Korean-style short ribs with a loaded grilled potato and grilled Brussels sprouts salad; Bryon's mini peach dump cakes are also made on the grill. (Cooking)

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E4 - Ree Drummond celebrates her late father-in-law with his favorite recipes; she honors his chocoholic lifestyle with skillet chocolate cakes before making biscuits and sausage pepper gravy, tenderloin steak bite and shrimp brochette jalapeno poppers. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E5 - Ree Drummond makes super-fast sweets with easy shortcuts; she stacks a showstopping layered tiramisu cake, serves up a stunning sticky bun crinkle cake, creates a charming cherry chocolate mug cake and scoops fruity blackberry lemon ice cream. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S37E1 - Ree Drummond puts a spin on recipes with her surf and turf skillet, spiced chicken sheet pan supper, mushroom and squash fajita bowls with cilantro-lime cauliflower rice and Tex-Mex toppings, and whipped cottage cheese with roasted berries. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S37E6 - Ree Drummond shares simple takes on comfort classics; she spices up Tex-Mex chicken fried steak, puts a speedy spin on pesto chicken lasagna skillet, gives cream of celery soup a retro vibe, and adds luxury to white chocolate hot chocolate. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S37E7 - Ree Drummond shares perfectly portioned meals for two. She has one-pan Apple Cider Pork Chops, speedy Easy Corn Pasta, extra comforting Meatloaf Patties and a shortcut side of Instant Cheesy Mash that's good enough for company. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: S36E1 - Ree Drummond hosts a Q&A with questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska while she makes a party ready epic dip platter; she spills the secrets on her speedy hamburger soup, easy tomato cream pasta and 3-ingredient sausage casserole. (Reality, Cooking)

programme.title: Saturday Night Live ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: Live from New York for more than four decades, celebrity hosts join an award-winning ensemble cast to perform comedic sketches, satirical news and digital shorts, alongside popular musical acts. Capturing the pop-culture zeitgeist, the show's sketches and segments often go viral the next day. Over the years, cast members have included Jimmy Fallon, Will Ferrell, Tina Fey, Kate McKinnon, Seth Meyers, Eddie Murphy, Bill Murray, Mike Myers, Amy Poehler, Chris Rock, Maya Rudolph, Andy Samberg, Kristen Wiig, and many more, as well as recurring guests such as Alec Baldwin, Melissa McCarthy and Steve Martin. From executive producer Lorne Michaels, "SNL" is widely considered an American late-night institution and continues to earn critical praise.

programme.title: 48 Hours ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: This newsmagazine investigates intriguing crime and justice cases that touch on all aspects of the human experience. Over its long run, the show has helped exonerate wrongly convicted people, driven the reopening -- and resolution -- of cold cases, and changed numerous lives. CBS News correspondents offer an in-depth look into each story, with the emphasis on solving the mystery at its heart. The program and its team have earned critical acclaim, including multiple Emmy, Peabody and Edward R. Murrow Awards.

programme.title: 60 Minutes ᴺᵉʷ
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Lesley Stahl, Scott Pelley, Anderson Cooper, Bill Whitaker, Sharyn Alfonsi, Jon Wertheim and Norah O'Donnell .

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Movie (2018) Dr. Don Shirley is a world-class African-American pianist who's about to embark on a concert tour in the Deep South in 1962. In need of a driver and protection, Shirley recruits Tony Lip, a tough-talking bouncer from an Italian-American neighborhood in the Bronx. Despite their differences, the two men soon develop an unexpected bond while confronting racism and danger in an era of segregation.

programme.desc: Improv actor and comic Stephen Colbert flexes the hosting muscles he honed over nearly 1,500 episodes of the popular and critically celebrated "The Colbert Report" at the helm of this long-running late-night talk show.
